archive_summary.title: Project Costs
archive_summary.description: Complete cost breakdown with budget, per-service, and per-task details.

included_content.item: budget summary and per-task cost breakdown

section.title: Project Costs (Full Detail)
section.content:
Total budget: $1.00 Total spent: $0.00 Budget remaining: $1.00 Spent: 0.0%
### Cost Breakdown by Category
* api: $0.00 * local_compute: $0.00 * remote_compute: $0.00
### Per-Task Costs
* t0001_brainstorm_results_1: $0.00 * t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models: $0.00 * t0003_simulator_library_survey: $0.00 * t0004_generate_target_tuning_curve: $0.00 * t0005_download_dsgc_morphology: $0.00 * t0006_brainstorm_results_2: $0.00 * t0007_install_neuron_netpyne: $0.00 * t0008_port_modeldb_189347: $0.00 * t0009_calibrate_dendritic_diameters: $0.00 * t0010_hunt_missed_dsgc_models: $0.00 * t0011_response_visualization_library: $0.00 * t0012_tuning_curve_scoring_loss_library: $0.00 * t0013_resolve_morphology_provenance: $0.00 * t0014_brainstorm_results_3: $0.00 * t0015_literature_survey_cable_theory: $0.00 * t0016_literature_survey_dendritic_computation: $0.00 * t0017_literature_survey_patch_clamp: $0.00 * t0018_literature_survey_synaptic_integration: $0.00 * t0019_literature_survey_voltage_gated_channels: $0.00 * t0020_port_modeldb_189347_gabamod: $0.00 * t0021_brainstorm_results_4: $0.00 * t0022_modify_dsgc_channel_testbed: $0.00 * t0024_port_de_rosenroll_2026_dsgc: $0.00 * t0025_brainstorm_results_5: $0.00 * t0026_vrest_sweep_tuning_curves_dsgc: $0.00 * t0027_literature_survey_morphology_ds_modeling: $0.00 * t0028_brainstorm_results_6: $0.00 * t0029_distal_dendrite_length_sweep_dsgc: $0.00 * t0030_distal_dendrite_diameter_sweep_dsgc: $0.00 * t0032_brainstorm_results_7: $0.00 * t0033_plan_dsgc_morphology_channel_optimisation: $0.00 * t0034_distal_dendrite_length_sweep_t0024: $0.00 * t0035_distal_dendrite_diameter_sweep_t0024: $0.00 * t0036_rerun_t0030_halved_null_gaba: $0.00 * t0037_null_gaba_reduction_ladder_t0022: $0.00 * t0038_correct_t0033_base_gaba_to_4ns: $0.00 * t0039_distal_dendrite_diameter_sweep_t0022_gaba4: $0.00 * t0040_brainstorm_results_8: $0.00
